metadata.file_path: /Volumes/My Passport/Ojo otra vez musica de Tidal Original descarga/Consolidado2025/Tracks/DeBarge - Who's Holding Donna Now.flac
metadata.title: Who's Holding Donna Now?
metadata.album: 20th Century Masters - The Millennium Collection: The Best Of DeBarge
metadata.lyrics:
[00:12.31] Sometimes a love won't let go
[00:18.75] 
[00:23.27] Hard as I try I know it shows
[00:28.99] 
[00:33.29] Everybody's telling me
[00:38.69] You'll be over her eventually
[00:44.09] But how am I supposed to feel so secure
[00:50.38] 
[00:52.82] When I keep wonderin' who's holding Donna now
[00:58.03] And I keep wonderin' who's heart she's knocking around
[01:03.68] There's nothing I wouldn't do to be in his shoes somehow
[01:14.25] And I keep wonderin' who's holding Donna now
[01:19.44] And I keep wonderin' what magic can be found
[01:24.80] To turn me back to the one who's holding Donna now
[01:33.85] 
[01:38.29] The letter started with goodbye
[01:44.31] 
[01:48.82] I've read it half a million times
[01:54.54] 
[01:58.78] Tell me this is just a dream
[02:04.15] When I wake up she'll be here next to me
[02:09.43] Tell me it will be just the way it was, oh
[02:18.11] Well I keep wonderin' who's holding Donna now
[02:23.42] And I keep wonderin' who's heart she's knocking around
[02:28.39] There's nothing I wouldn't do to be in his shoes right now
[02:37.41] 
[02:39.47] And I keep wonderin' who's holding Donna now
[02:44.75] And I keep wonderin' what magic can be found
[02:50.04] To turn me back to the one who's holding Donna now
[02:59.12] 
[03:22.81] (Who's holding Donna now)
[03:27.15] I keep wonderin' (who's heart she's knocking around)
[03:32.50] There's nothing I wouldn't do to be in his shoes right now whoa, whoa
[03:44.98] (Who's holding Donna now) oh, Donna
[03:50.56] (What magic can be found)
[03:54.68] To make me the one, who's holding Donna now
[04:02.84] I can't get Donna off my mind (who's holding Donna now)
[04:09.98] I keep wonderin' (who's heart she's knocking around)
[04:15.22] There's nothing I wouldn't do, to be in his shoes right now
[04:22.72]
